description_long: This is a weathered wooden storage box reinforced with metal brackets at the corners, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance. The wood panels are stained and show signs of age, with patches of greenish mold or moss and areas of discoloration. One side features a faded warning sign reading 'FLAMMABLE GAS' in red within a diamond, while another side displays a large, partially obscured 'DANGER' stencil. A third side is decorated with a festive image of Santa Claus peeking out from behind a plank, accompanied by the text 'Don't open til Dec 25th!'. The top and remaining side are plain, showing only the aged wood and metal. The box appears solid and heavy, suitable for secure storage or transport of hazardous or special items.
description: A rugged, weathered wooden storage box with metal reinforcements, warning labels, and a festive Santa graphic on one side.
description_view_0: This view shows the plain wooden side of the box, with visible metal corner brackets and aged, stained wood.
description_view_1: This side features a festive Santa Claus image and the text 'Don't open til Dec 25th!', adding a unique decorative touch.
description_view_2: This view displays a red 'FLAMMABLE GAS' warning sign, indicating hazardous contents.
description_view_3: This side has a large, faded 'DANGER' stencil, further emphasizing caution.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: painted warning signs and festive graphic
